pages.text: There’s an alien in my house... We are under attack!
The walls are changing colour. It must be the alien. The air is getting warmer. It must be the alien.
Strangers keep coming. It must be the alien.
We need protection. I build a fort. Mom and Dad normally build with me, but these days I feel invisible. It must be the alien.
t. I t m h u g s t i b n e e t h h e t a f w e i r d o l a n o i i s e e e l r i n d n a t h e i d m. e h I
We are under attack! I am an army of one.
1 step, 2 step... 3 step, 4 step... I am the army. Ready for battle.
5 step, 6 step... Away with you, alien!
9 step, 10 step... I am by its head. Woah! I get a fright. It is tiny and it......looks like me?! How can that be? Is it really an alien?
Maybe it’s a friend. Maybe it’s my friend?
1 step, 2 step... We are now an army of two.
